intended_use: AutoContour is intended to assist radiation treatment planners in contouring and reviewing structures within medical images in preparation for radiation therapy treatment planning.
intended_use_full: AutoContour is intended to assist radiation treatment planners in contouring and reviewing structures within medical images in preparation for radiation therapy treatment planning.
target_condition: Radiation therapy treatment planning across head and neck, thorax, abdomen, and pelvis regions
ground_truth: Manual consensus contours generated by three clinically experienced experts (2 radiation therapy physicists and 1 radiation dosimetrist) following NRG/RTOG guidelines
other_metrics: Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC): CT large structures mean 0.88+/-0.06, medium 0.88+/-0.08, small 0.75+/-0.12. External CT validation: large 0.90+/-0.09, medium 0.83+/-0.12, small 0.79+/-0.11. MR training: medium 0.87+/-0.07, small 0.74+/-0.07. External clinical reviewer ratings (1-5 scale): average 4.5 across all CT structures.
